dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7554 IH: Curtailing Agency Reach and Bureaucracy Overreach on Net-Zero Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Onder introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Clean Air Act to exclude carbon dioxide, methane, and nitrous oxide from the definition of the term air pollutant.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Curtailing Agency Reach and Bureaucracy Overreach on Net-Zero Act or the CARBON Act.

section.header: Exclusion of carbon dioxide, methane, and nitrous oxide
section.text: Section 302(g) of the Clean Air Act (42 U.S.C. 7602(g)) is amended by adding at the end Such term does not include carbon dioxide, methane, or nitrous oxide..
